題幹: People got very excited when they watched Ms. Smith _____ at the party.
選項: (A) danced (B) dancing (C) has danced (D) to dance

題幹: Rex did not feel the earthquake this morning. He _____ in the park at the time.
選項: (A) jogged (B) was jogging (C) has jogged (D) would jog

題幹: Ed and Jill _____ camping this weekend, so they have to finish their homework by Friday.
選項: (A) went (B) were going (C) are going (D) have gone

題幹: Doraemon, a blue Japanese robot cat, has hated mice since his ears _____ by a mouse.
選項: (A) bit (B) bite (C) were bitten (D) have bitten

題幹: If we play some interesting games in class, there _____ more fun in learning English.
選項: (A) are (B) has (C) will be (D) will have

題幹: Scott wasn’t sure if the young woman before him was _____ pulled him out of a car on fire.
選項: (A) who (B) the one (C) the one she (D) the one who

題幹: I _____ swimming for several years before I went to this high school. I gave it up because of heavy schoolwork.
選項: (A) have practiced (B) am practicing (C) practiced (D) would practice

題幹: The new medicine that just came out on the market _____ thousands of lives.
選項: (A) and saved (B) has saved (C) saving (D) to save

題幹: Now I often think of those days with Pip, my pet dog. When I read in my room, he _____ quietly beside me.
選項: (A) will come and sit (B) comes and sits (C) has come and sat (D) used to come and sit

題幹: Although it took me lots of time _____ a big meal for ten people, I was happy that everyone enjoyed it.
選項: (A) prepare (B) to prepare (C) preparing (D) prepared

題幹: Bob is _____ of the boys in the family. He never does any housework. His brothers at least take out the garbage sometimes.
選項: (A) lazier (B) the lazy (C) the lazier (D) the laziest

題幹: Aunt Gina has lived in this town for more than sixty years, so she _____ it very well.
選項: (A) will know (B) knew (C) knows (D) was going to know

題幹: Yesterday when I got home from work, my brother _____ for dinner, so he invited me to join him.
選項: (A) goes out (B) went out (C) has gone out (D) was going out

題幹: Have you found a summer job yet? Mr. Firth _____ someone to take care of his kids during the vacation. Maybe you can talk to him.
選項: (A) has looked for (B) is looking for (C) looks for (D) was looking for

題幹: David looked out of the balcony window and saw a woman get in his car _____ away.
選項: (A) drive (B) drove (C) and drive (D) and drove

題幹: The police haven’t found the little girl who _____ at a supermarket. They’ll keep doing all they can to find her.
選項: (A) took away (B) taken away (C) has taken away (D) was taken away

題幹: Buses to the airport only come once every hour, and we just missed _____. Why don’t we take a taxi?
選項: (A) another (B) it (C) one (D) them

題幹: Ariel _____ every night for a week before her Chinese test and got a very good grade.
選項: (A) studied (B) studies (C) has studied (D) was going to study

題幹: Listen! The baby _____ in the bedroom. Why don’t you go in and take a look?
選項: (A) cried (B) cries (C) is crying (D) will cry

題幹: Paul misses his parents a lot. He _____ them since he came to work in Taiwan a year ago.
選項: (A) didn’t see (B) doesn’t see (C) hasn’t seen (D) won’t see

題幹: Our teacher Ms. Wu seldom laughs, but when she _____, everyone in the same building can hear her.
選項: (A) can (B) does (C) has (D) will

題幹: My sister is coming to my home today. She _____ with me for a week.
選項: (A) stays (B) stayed (C) has stayed (D) will stay

題幹: If you’re interested in our business plan, _____ this number and ask for Ms. Lee. She’ll answer your questions.
選項: (A) calling (B) call (C) and call (D) to call

題幹: Fiona loves listening to her children sing songs _____ at school.
選項: (A) are learned (B) that learned (C) they learned (D) that they are learned

題幹: Nora: Can I check your drawer for some tools we can use? Matt: Sure. Take a look. See if you can find _____ in there.
選項: (A) any (B) it (C) others (D) those

題幹: My wife enjoys going to the movies with her friends, but I like to watch TV at home by _____.
選項: (A) I (B) me (C) myself (D) mine

題幹: For the past twenty years, my father _____ in a school library. But he’ll leave the job next month.
選項: (A) worked (B) has worked (C) is working (D) works

題幹: Mozart _____ his first music when he was only six years old.
選項: (A) is writing (B) has written (C) will write (D) wrote

題幹: Alison doesn’t like _____ what to do. She only does things she wants to do.
選項: (A) told (B) to tell (C) be told (D) to be told

題幹: Josh has planned to make a trip to New York and _____ some of his friends there.
選項: (A) visit (B) visits (C) visiting (D) visited

題幹: We were so sure that Jerry _____ well on the difficult job. His past experience in other work showed he was the right guy for it. So when he failed, no one believed it.
選項: (A) had done (B) did (C) has done (D) would do

題幹: For Mike, the price is _____ important thing when he shops for jeans. He cares even more about the shape and the size of the pockets.
選項: (A) the more (B) the most (C) the less (D) the least

題幹: Playing games on the cellphone _____ popular with high school students.
選項: (A) is (B) are (C) being (D) to be

題幹: There _____ more than twenty clubs in our school. Which one would you like to join?
選項: (A) has (B) have (C) is (D) are

題幹: The book under Mary’s desk is _____, but I don’t know why it is there.
選項: (A) us (B) me (C) my (D) mine

題幹: It almost killed Kevin to take care of his baby sister for one afternoon. He wondered how his mom could do _____ every day.
選項: (A) her (B) it (C) one (D) them

題幹: _____ that last piece of pie? If not, can I have it? I didn’t eat much this morning.
選項: (A) Had you eaten (B) Were you eating (C) Do you eat (D) Are you going to eat

題幹: In my school days, I _____ to English radio programs every day. That was how I learned English at that time.
選項: (A) listen (B) have listened (C) used to listen (D) was listening

題幹: When the baby cried, Mr. Wu ______ in the kitchen and did not hear it.
選項: (A) cooked (B) was cooking (C) has cooked (D) is going to cook

題幹: I don’t have any money with me because I ______ my wallet this morning.
選項: (A) had lost (B) would lose (C) lost (D) was losing

題幹: Dad: Have you brushed your teeth yet? Ann: No, but I ______ before I go to bed.
選項: (A) haven’t (B) have (C) won’t (D) will

題幹: It took the police lots of time ______ who entered Liu’s house and killed her one year ago.
選項: (A) and found out (B) find out (C) finding out (D) to find out

題幹: Many famous people visit this restaurant. Popular singers like A-mei and Jay Chou ______ here with their friends.
選項: (A) to be often seen (B) often seen (C) are often seen (D) and are often seen
